directory_structure.description: 請在你的專案根目錄下建立 .ai_context/ 隱藏資料夾，並配置以下三個核心 XML 知識檔

organization_profile.department: Operations Management Office (OMO) inside IC Design Industry.
organization_profile.domain: SoC & Modem project planning, digital transformation, and headcount operations.

project.focus: Firmware architecture, power optimization, hardware-software co-design dependencies.
project.bottlenecks: Cross-functional resource allocation, milestone tracking for Tape-out timelines.

domain_glossary.term: Technical Performance Assessment (績效評估與技術審查)
Annual Operating Plan (年度營運計畫，涉及預算與 Headcount 分配)
IC 設計最後晶片投片階段

decision_logic.priority: Critical Path: Always prioritize projects within 3 months of Tape-out.
Bottleneck Resolution: Prioritize Modem digital verification and power optimization modules.
Conflict Resolution: When resources clash, escalate with a data-driven ROI projection.

output_standards.format_rule: Explicitly list potential risk vectors (Schedule, Resource, Technical).
Define clear action items with owners or functional teams.
Tone must be concise, analytical, and highly structured Markdown inside XML blocks. No conversational fluff.

session_initialization_prompt.text:
Initialize Assistant with Organization Context.
Please read and ingest the following local context files to understand our domain, terminology, and operational frameworks. Do not modify these files; use them as your core background knowledge for all subsequent tasks in this session.
Files to read: 1. `.ai_context/01_org_profile.xml` 2. `.ai_context/02_glossary.xml` 3. `.ai_context/03_frameworks.xml`
[INSTRUCTION] - Acknowledge that you have read these files by outputting a very brief 3-line summary of your role (OMO Tech Lead Assistant), the active project (Modem), and the required output format. - Do not output any other greeting or conversational text. - Going forward, align every analysis, report generation, or code optimization with the guidelines defined in <output_standards> and <decision_logic>.

text_processor.input_type: Raw Text / Word / PPTX Text Export
text_processor.system_prompt_template:
你是一個高階的文檔工程師。請將輸入的原始文件內容，提煉成最精煉、無冗言贅字的組織知識庫格式。
【轉換規則】 1. 移除所有客套話、過場引言、歷史背景說明。 2. 區分「技術參數」與「營運邏輯」： - 只要看到通訊協定、晶片參數、介面、狀態機，一律用 Markdown 表格整理。 - 只要看到時程、人力配置(Headcount)、資源依賴、專案里程碑，一律用條列式呈現核心決策點。 3. 輸出必須嚴格使用 XML 標籤包裝（例如：<technical_spec> 或 <operational_logic>）。 4. 嚴禁輸出任何解釋性文字，直接輸出轉換後的結果。
text_processor.claude_code_command: claude "Read raw_document.txt and apply text_processor rules, then save to .ai_context/04_extracted_spec.xml"

vision_processor.instruction_to_claude_code:
Read the architecture image `.ai_context/raw_images/modem_power_state_flow.png`. Analyze the image and convert it into a structured XML format: 1. Wrap a detailed text description inside <functional_description> tags, explaining the states, transitions, and conditional triggers. 2. Convert the visual flow into a complete Mermaid.js stateDiagram-v2 or flowchart TD block inside <mermaid_diagram> tags, so that it can render perfectly in our internal Wiki.
Save the output to `.ai_context/05_power_state_spec.xml`. Do not add conversational fluff.

power_state_spec.functional_description: 本圖定義了 Modem 模組在低功耗模式下的狀態轉移邏輯。 核心狀態包含：SLEEP, WAKEUP, ACTIVE。當暫存器 REG_EN 設為 1 時，觸發 WAKEUP。
power_state_spec.mermaid_diagram: ```mermaid stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> SLEEP : Power On SLEEP --> WAKEUP : IRQ_Trigger / REG_EN=1 WAKEUP --> ACTIVE : Calibration Done ACTIVE --> SLEEP : Go_Sleep_Cmd
